app.script:
df <- subset(get.input(), !is.na(current_A))
df$voltage_mean_V <- rowMeans(df[c("voltage_1_V", "voltage_2_V", "voltage_3_V")], na.rm = TRUE)
df$voltage_sd_V <- apply(df[c("voltage_1_V", "voltage_2_V", "voltage_3_V")], 1, sd, na.rm = TRUE)
fit <- lm(voltage_mean_V ~ 0 + current_A, data = df)
theme <- get.graph.settings()
plot(df$current_A, df$voltage_mean_V,
  pch = 19, col = theme$accent, cex = 1.6,
  xlab = "current_A", ylab = "mean voltage_V",
  main = "Ohm's Law"
)
arrows(df$current_A, df$voltage_mean_V - df$voltage_sd_V,
  df$current_A, df$voltage_mean_V + df$voltage_sd_V,
  angle = 90, code = 3, length = 0.05
)
abline(a = 0, b = coef(fit)[1], col = theme$fg, lwd = 2)
print(df[c("current_A", "voltage_mean_V", "voltage_sd_V")])
cat(sprintf("Estimated resistance: %.2f ohm\n", coef(fit)[1]))

ui.sheetStatus: オームの法則サンプル
